classes.definition: Same declared input must yield byte-identical bytes and identical SHA-256 across all declared environments.
Source bytes may differ across environments, but a declared machine canonicalization must reduce them to identical canonical bytes and identical SHA-256.
Surface is intentionally excluded from reproducibility equality because it embeds transparency-log, workflow-run, human-ceremony, or other bounded non-deterministic material.

surfaces.reason: GitHub workflow run ids, attempts, URLs, and timing metadata are externally assigned.
Current-head keyless receipt binds a specific workflow run and transparency event.
Sigstore bundle and Rekor inclusion carry signed timestamps and transparency-log envelopes.
Final WS13 receipt is generated after evidence import and may lawfully record wall-clock issuance time.

scope: Bounded WS13 determinism proof only. Class assignments do not widen release readiness, verifier acceptance, or non-declared artifact surfaces.
stronger_claim_not_made: All KT artifacts are now globally reproducible
CLASS_C surfaces are semantically downgraded or unimportant
WS13 proves release readiness or campaign completion
